Get involved

Join the work.

TRI AI is built by a community of learners, researchers, mentors, and supporters. There are several ways to be part of it.

01 — Three paths

Find your way in.

01 — Apply to learn

Join a programme

Applications open seasonally for TRI AI Saturdays cohorts and partner courses.

View programmes →

02 — Collaborate

Research partnerships

Universities, labs, and independent researchers — get in touch about joint work, datasets, and grant collaboration.

Email research →

03 — Mentor

Share your expertise

Volunteer as a mentor, instructor, or technical reviewer. Open to AI/ML practitioners worldwide.

Volunteer →

Partner with us

For organisations.

Companies, foundations, and institutions: TRI AI partners on cohort sponsorship, joint research, hackathons, and capacity-building programmes. We've worked with global names and grassroots networks alike.

partnerships@tri-ai.org

Recent partners

Google DeepMind, Data Science Africa, and a growing network of African universities and research labs.

Funding

TRI AI is a registered non-governmental organisation. Donations are tax-deductible in select jurisdictions.

Donate

Stay connected

TRI AI Dispatch

Monthly updates on programmes, research, and opportunities — delivered straight to your inbox.
